description: Lobu exposes shared agent memory over MCP. Connect once at https://lobu.ai/mcp, sign in with OAuth, list your organizations, and switch to the workspace an agent should read and write.

transports.note: Use the canonical hosted endpoint for Lobu-managed workspaces. Self-hosted Lobu gateways can expose their own MCP endpoint through the gateway proxy.

builtInTools.name: list_organizations
builtInTools.description: List Lobu workspaces available to the signed-in user.

builtInTools.name: switch_organization
builtInTools.description: Select the workspace whose memory and tools the current MCP session should use.

authentication.description: OAuth is brokered by Lobu; user tokens stay server-side and never leave the platform.
